name: projectflux
description: MyProPlanner - Full-stack planner with List and Gantt views

scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.dev:full: npm run db:start && npm run dev
scripts.setup:db: npm --prefix backend exec ts-node src/runSqlFile.ts src/schema.sql
scripts.seed:db: npm --prefix backend exec ts-node src/runSqlFile.ts src/seed.sql
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
